org.springframework.ai.vectorstore
Provides interfaces and implementations for working with vector databases in Spring AI.
org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.azure
Provides the API for embedding observations.
org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.bedrockknowledgebase
Provides the Amazon Bedrock Knowledge Base vector store implementation.

Provides the API for embedding observations.

Provides the API for embedding observations.

    Class
    Description
    class 
    DocumentEmbeddingRequest
    Represents a request to embed a list of documents.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<List<Document>>
    BatchingStrategy.batch(List<Document> documents)

    Method
    Description

    Embeds the given document's content into a vector.

  • Uses of Document in org.springframework.ai.rag.generation.augmentation

    Subinterfaces with type arguments of type Document in org.springframework.ai.rag.generation.augmentation
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    QueryAugmenter
    A component for augmenting an input query with additional data, useful to provide a large language model with the necessary context to answer the user query.
    Method parameters in org.springframework.ai.rag.generation.augmentation with type arguments of type Document
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default Query
    QueryAugmenter.apply(Query query, List<Document> documents)
     
    Query
    ContextualQueryAugmenter.augment(Query query, List<Document> documents)
     
    Query
    QueryAugmenter.augment(Query query, List<Document> documents)
    Augments the user query with contextual data.
    ContextualQueryAugmenter.Builder
    ContextualQueryAugmenter.Builder.documentFormatter(Function<List<Document>, String> documentFormatter)

    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description

  • Uses of Document in org.springframework.ai.rag.postretrieval.document

    Subinterfaces with type arguments of type Document in org.springframework.ai.rag.postretrieval.document
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    DocumentPostProcessor
    A component for post-processing retrieved documents based on a query, addressing challenges such as "lost-in-the-middle", context length restrictions from the model, and the need to reduce noise and redundancy in the retrieved information.
    interface 
    DocumentPostProcessor
    A component for post-processing retrieved documents based on a query, addressing challenges such as "lost-in-the-middle", context length restrictions from the model, and the need to reduce noise and redundancy in the retrieved information.
    Methods in org.springframework.ai.rag.postretrieval.document that return types with arguments of type Document
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default List<Document>
    DocumentPostProcessor.apply(Query query, List<Document> documents)
     
    List<Document>
    DocumentPostProcessor.process(Query query, List<Document> documents)

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default List<Document>
    DocumentPostProcessor.apply(Query query, List<Document> documents)

    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    DocumentJoiner
    A component for combining documents retrieved based on multiple queries and from multiple data sources into a single collection of documents.

    DocumentJoiner
    A component for combining documents retrieved based on multiple queries and from multiple data sources into a single collection of documents.

    Interface
    Description

    DocumentRetriever
    Component responsible for retrieving Documents from an underlying data source, such as a search engine, a vector store, a database, or a knowledge graph.

    VectorStoreRetriever.similaritySearch(String query)
    Retrieves documents by query embedding similarity using the default SearchRequest's search criteria.
    List<Document>
    VectorStoreRetriever.similaritySearch(SearchRequest request)
    Retrieves documents by query embedding similarity and metadata filters to retrieve exactly the number of nearest-neighbor results that match the request criteria.
    Method parameters in org.springframework.ai.vectorstore with type arguments of type Document

    Description
